name: latency_streaming_dry_run
description: Demonstrates max_ttfe_seconds, max_ttft_seconds, and max_ttlt_seconds - per-stream-event timing thresholds. Dry-run only because only agents that capture NDJSON stream timing populate these (claude-code does; cursor reports total only). To enable, run with --agent claude-code without --dry-run.

turns.message: Reply with the single word 'pong' on its own line. Nothing else.
